items.title: Bitcoin, Ethereum, and Solana ETFs record weekly inflows amid price weakness
items.whyYouShouldCare: The inflows into Bitcoin, Ethereum, and Solana ETFs suggest growing institutional interest, which could enhance SOL's market positioning and liquidity.

items.title: The Legal Strategy Behind Crypto Exchange Backpack's Token-to-Equity Program
items.whyYouShouldCare: Backpack's token-to-equity program may set a precedent for regulatory compliance in crypto, potentially influencing Solana's ecosystem and its projects.

items.title: CoinDesk 20 performance update: NEAR Protocol (NEAR) jumps 12.4% over weekend
items.whyYouShouldCare: NEAR Protocol's performance surge may indicate competitive pressure on Solana, highlighting the need for SOL to maintain its ecosystem's attractiveness.
